## Problem

What workflow or limitation should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or competing approaches.

## Operational Notes

Mention expected config changes, dependencies, security implications, or DB/index rebuild impact.
